title: QuestCraft Performance Boost
description: QuestCraft Performance Boost is a lightweight Minecraft  modpack designed to improve VR performance on the Meta Quest 3S/3/2. Featuring optimization mods like Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore, it delivers smoother gameplay with 60+ FPS.
body:
Struggling with FPS in QuestCraft on your Meta Quest? This lightweight performance modpack is designed to give you the smoothest VR experience possible in Minecraft — no frills, just raw power.

🛠 What’s Inside:

Sodium + Indium + Continuity: A trio of rendering optimizers for better visuals and speed.

Lithium & Krypton: Physics and network optimization for snappier performance.

FerriteCore & Memory Leak Fix: Major memory usage improvements to keep VR stutter-free.

Entity Culling & Enhanced Block Entities: Smart rendering that skips what's not visible.

ImmediatelyFast & Methane: Squeeze every frame out of your system.

Model Gap Fix, Noisium, and others: Visual and logic fixes that add up.

Fabric API & Kotlin support: The backbone for mod compatibility.

🧠 Recommended Settings:

Lower your mipmap levels and render distance for the best results.

Note: Shader support is not tested and visual quality may be reduced.

⚠️ Disclaimer: Mods were tested only on Meta Quest 3. Expect visual downgrades for a massive boost in performance.

🎮 Result: 60+ FPS in VR — turning Minecraft into a smoother, more immersive experience.
